---
title: "GLEAM geneset sources"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM geneset sources}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
list_geneset_sources()
search_geneset("hallmark", "INTERFERON")

gs <- get_geneset("hallmark", source = "builtin")
# optional msigdbr-backed sources:
# gs_go <- get_geneset(NULL, source = "go", ontology = "BP")
```
